chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1122 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 4394/24 3.For hearing of main case 06-11-2025 Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for petitioner. M/s Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G and Naheed Akhtar, APG. **** Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is according disposed of as not pressed along with listed application(s).
